name: Crab Casserole Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the spinach and cook until all the liquid has evaporated.
3. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Combine the white sauce, cheese, and lemon juice in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the cheese melts.
5. Remove the cartilage from the crab meat.
6. Add to the sauce along with the water chestnuts.
7. In an 10-inch casserole, layer half of the spinach and mushroom soup mixture.
8. Top with half of the crab mixture.
9. Repeat layers with Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake at 300 degrees for 1 hour.
